name: Cal Redwood Acquisition Corp.
business: The company is a blank check company (SPAC) formed to effect a merger or similar business combination with one or more target businesses. It has generated no revenues and intends to focus on businesses in the technology, media, and telecommunications (TMT) sector and sectors undergoing technology disruption.

exposures.sentence: While we may pursue an initial business combination in any sector, we intend to focus our efforts on businesses in the technology, media and telecommunications ( TMT ) sector as well as sectors that are being transformed via technology disruption, where we believe our management team s operational and investment expertise will provide us with a competitive advantage.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until May 27, 2027 or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate our initial business combination.
